zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane D'Artois於大約1405年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，她的父親Jenico d’Artois57歲，母親Joan Taaffe21歲。她於大約1424年與Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane D'Artois于大约1405年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，她的父亲Jenico d’Artois57岁，母亲Joan Taaffe21岁。她于大约1424年与Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jane D'Artois was born about 1405, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Jenico d’Artois, was 57 and her mother, Joan Taaffe, was 21. She married Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston about 1424, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died after 1441.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane D'Artois est née environ 1405, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Jenico d’Artois, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Joan Taaffe, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston environ 1424, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1441.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane D'Artois um 1405 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jenico d’Artois 57 und ihre Mutter Joan Taaffe 21. Sie hat um 1424 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1441.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane D'Artois è nata il circa 1405 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Jenico d’Artois, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Joan Taaffe, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston circa 1424, nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1441.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane D'Artoisが約1405年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Jenico d’Artoisは57歳，母Joan Taaffeは21歳であった。約1424年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンでChristopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane D'Artois(이)가 대략 1405년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jenico d’Artois(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Taaffe(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1424년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane D'Artois nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Jenico d’Artois, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Joan Taaffe, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston aproximadamente 1424, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1441.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane D'Artois родилась около 1405 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Jenico d’Artois было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Taaffe, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston около 1424 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1441 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane D'Artois nació aproximadamente 1405, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Jenico d’Artois, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Joan Taaffe, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Christopher Preston 3rd Baron Gormanston aproximadamente 1424, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1441.
